name: Twin XL Waterproof Down Alternative Mattress Pad - Threshold™: Hypoallergenic, Quilted, Fits 18" Depth
description:
Add another layer of comfort to your bed by placing this Waterproof Down Alternative Mattress Pad from Threshold™ on your mattress. This mattress pad in crisp white features a quilted design and a four-way stretch fitted skirt, and it fits mattresses up to 18 inches deep. The soft recycled fiber fill offers cushioning for a more restful sleep, while the waterproof construction provides protection against spills or accidents.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
